name: forecasting_agent
description: Agent responsible for demand forecasting. Trains on cleaned inventory data and predicts future demand using a Random Forest model.

capabilities.name: forecast_demand
capabilities.description: Run the forecasting pipeline to train the model and output demand predictions.

data_path.description: Path to the processed/cleaned CSV file (e.g. data/processed/cleaned_data.csv)

metrics.description: Model performance metrics (MSE, RMSE, MAE, R2)

target_column.description: Name of the target column predicted

predictions_summary.description: Stats like mean, min, max, std, and total predicted demand

predictions.description: List of predicted demand values corresponding to the input rows
